channel.title: Tags on zx10r Security Notes
channel.description: Browse zx10r Security Notes by topic, including web testing, CTF practice, enumeration, Active Directory, and methodology.

item.title: CTF
item.description: Capture-the-flag practice notes focused on enumeration, exploitation paths, and habits that transfer into labs.

item.title: Privilege Escalation
item.description: Notes on moving from initial access to stronger control through misconfigurations, permissions, and environment clues.

item.title: Web
item.description: Web application testing notes covering application mapping, input handling, logic flaws, and clean proof of impact.

item.title: Active Directory
item.description: Notes on Active Directory enumeration, trust-path thinking, Windows environments, and escalation practice.

item.title: Lateral Movement
item.description: Lab notes about moving through environments, validating access paths, and understanding trust relationships.

item.title: Windows
item.description: Windows security lab notes covering enumeration, configuration issues, and domain environment practice.

item.title: Methodology
item.description: Reusable security workflows, checklists, and habits for cleaner testing and clearer reporting.

item.title: Enumeration
item.description: Notes about mapping targets carefully, collecting signals, and turning small findings into useful attack paths.
